product.name: Ari Pike
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny i dzianiny z włókna AriPam odporne na UV
product.familyDescriptorEn: UV-resistant AriPam fibre fabrics and knits
product.categorySourceGroup: AriPam spun fabrics for shoe lining
product.specLine: 210 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, Pique Knit Fabric
descriptions: It is used as a lining inside of the shoes.
Ari Pike can also be used on promotional t-shirts.
210 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, Pique Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product mentions use on promotional t-shirts and UV protection, but no explicit athletic/sport use is stated.

stage1.noMatchReason: Product is explicitly described as a shoe lining fabric (pique knit for lining inside shoes) and as usable on promotional t-shirts, with UV protection and OEKO-TEX certification. No explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, or transport application is stated.

evidence: It is used as a lining inside of the shoes.
categorySourceGroup: AriPam spun fabrics for shoe lining
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described and specified as a lining fabric for shoes, matching the footwear-components category directly.

secondary.rationale: The mention of promotional t-shirts is too generic and not tied to a specific application (sport, workwear, etc.) to justify a secondary classification.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only vague mention of 'promotional t-shirts' with UV protection; no explicit athletic or sport-specific use stated.
UV resistance and t-shirt use could suggest general apparel, but no outdoor/functional-specific claim is made.
